description: Luxurious Accommodations Experience the essence of Seattle culture in our unique rooms with Juliet balconies and floor-to-ceiling windows. Enjoy modern amenities like a refrigerator, mini-bar, and coffee/tea makers for your comfort. Culinary Delights Indulge in the eclectic menu at Margaux, offering Northwestern cuisine with local influences. Whether it's breakfast, lunch, dinner, or weekend brunch, savor the flavors in a casual setting. Unwind at Margaux Lounge with a full-service bar and a lighter menu. Wellness and Convenience Stay active at our 24-hour fitness center equipped with top-notch equipment. Take advantage of our business center and laundry services for a seamless stay. With a
importantInfo: Please note, guests using a debit card as final form of payment will be charged a refundable USD 100 per night fee. Please Note: Only service animals are allowed at the property.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Guests under the age of 18 can only check in with a parent or official guardian. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and charges are applicable.

policies.name: Pets
policies.description: Pets are not allowed.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Children up to and including 12 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. Children from 13 years old to 17 years old stay for US$20 per person per night when using an existing bed. You haven't added any extra beds. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Public parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and costs USD 52.40 per day.
